repository-template.description: The description for this template
repository-template.name: description

repository-template.description: Configuration block that defines filters to specify which image tags can override the default tag mutability setting. Only applicable when image_tag_mutability is set to IMMUTABLE_WITH_EXCLUSION or MUTABLE_WITH_EXCLUSION.
repository-template.name: image_tag_mutability_exclusion_filter

repository-template.description: ARN of the Secret which will be used to authenticate against the registry to use for the pull through cache rule
repository-template.name: credential_arn

repository-template.description: Name to use on IAM role created
repository-template.name: iam_role_name

repository-template.description: Which features this template applies to. Must contain one or more of `PULL_THROUGH_CACHE` or `REPLICATION`. Defaults to `PULL_THROUGH_CACHE`
repository-template.name: applied_for

repository-template.description: The lifecycle policy document to apply to any created repositories
repository-template.name: lifecycle_policy

repository-template.description: (Required) The repository name prefix to match against. Use `ROOT` to match any prefix that doesn't explicitly match another template
repository-template.name: prefix

repository-template.description: The registry URL of the upstream public registry to use as the source for the pull through cache rule
repository-template.name: upstream_registry_url

repository-template.description: Determines whether a repository policy will be created
repository-template.name: create_repository_policy

repository-template.description: Determines whether the IAM role name (`iam_role_name`) is used as a prefix
repository-template.name: iam_role_use_name_prefix

repository-template.description: Determines whether resources will be created (affects all resources)
repository-template.name: create

repository-template.description: Region where this resource will be managed. Defaults to the Region set in the provider configuration.
repository-template.name: region

repository-template.description: The type of encryption to use for any created repositories. Must be one of: `AES256` or `KMS`. Defaults to `AES256`
repository-template.name: encryption_type

repository-template.description: A map of tags to assign to any created repositories
repository-template.name: resource_tags

repository-template.description: The ARNs of the IAM users/roles that have read access to the repository
repository-template.name: repository_read_access_arns

repository-template.description: The ARNs of the Lambda service roles that have read access to the repository
repository-template.name: repository_lambda_read_access_arns

repository-template.description: A map of IAM policy [statements](https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/aws/latest/docs/data-sources/iam_policy_document#statement) for custom permission usage
repository-template.name: repository_policy_statements

repository-template.description: Determines whether the ECR service IAM role should be created
repository-template.name: create_iam_role

repository-template.description: A map of tags to add to all resources
repository-template.name: tags

repository-template.description: The tag mutability setting for any created repositories. Must be one of: `MUTABLE`, `MUTABLE_WITH_EXCLUSION`, `IMMUTABLE`, or `IMMUTABLE_WITH_EXCLUSION`. Defaults to `IMMUTABLE`
repository-template.name: image_tag_mutability

repository-template.description: The JSON policy to apply to the repository. If not specified, uses the default policy
repository-template.name: repository_policy

repository-template.description: A custom IAM role to use for repository creation. Required if using repository tags or KMS encryption
repository-template.name: custom_role_arn

repository-template.description: The ARNs of the IAM users/roles that have read/write access to the repository
repository-template.name: repository_read_write_access_arns

repository-template.description: IAM role path
repository-template.name: iam_role_path

repository-template.description: Description of the role
repository-template.name: iam_role_description

repository-template.description: ARN of the policy that is used to set the permissions boundary for the IAM role
repository-template.name: iam_role_permissions_boundary

repository-template.description: A map of additional tags to add to the IAM role created
repository-template.name: iam_role_tags

repository-template.description: Determines whether a pull through cache rule will be created
repository-template.name: create_pull_through_cache_rule

repository-template.description: The ARN of the KMS key used to encrypt the repositories created
repository-template.name: kms_key_arn

root.description: A map of tags to add to all resources
root.name: tags

root.description: Region where this resource will be managed. Defaults to the Region set in the provider configuration.
root.name: region

root.description: Determines whether a repository will be created
root.name: create_repository

root.description: Indicates whether images are scanned after being pushed to the repository (`true`) or not scanned (`false`)
root.name: repository_image_scan_on_push

root.description: Determines whether a repository policy will be attached to the repository
root.name: attach_repository_policy

root.description: The ARNs of the IAM users/roles that have read/write access to the repository
root.name: repository_read_write_access_arns

root.description: Determines whether a registry replication configuration will be created
root.name: create_registry_replication_configuration

root.description: Determines whether the registry scanning configuration will be managed
root.name: manage_registry_scanning_configuration

root.description: The replication rules for a replication configuration. A maximum of 10 are allowed
root.name: registry_replication_rules

root.description: The ARN of the KMS key to use when encryption_type is `KMS`. If not specified, uses the default AWS managed key for ECR
root.name: repository_kms_key

root.description: The JSON policy to apply to the repository. If not specified, uses the default policy
root.name: repository_policy

root.description: The policy document. This is a JSON formatted string. See more details about [Policy Parameters](http://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonECR/latest/userguide/LifecyclePolicies.html#lifecycle_policy_parameters) in the official AWS docs
root.name: repository_lifecycle_policy

root.description: the scanning type to set for the registry. Can be either `ENHANCED` or `BASIC`
root.name: registry_scan_type

root.description: The type of repository to create. Either `public` or `private`
root.name: repository_type

root.description: If `true`, will delete the repository even if it contains images. Defaults to `false`
root.name: repository_force_delete

root.description: Catalog data configuration for the repository
root.name: public_repository_catalog_data
root.type:
object({
    about_text        = optional(string)
    architectures     = optional(list(string))
    description       = optional(string)
    logo_image_blob   = optional(string)
    operating_systems = optional(list(string))
    usage_text        = optional(string)
  })

root.description: Determines whether a registry policy will be created
root.name: create_registry_policy

root.description: List of pull through cache rules to create
root.name: registry_pull_through_cache_rules
root.type:
map(object({
    ecr_repository_prefix      = string
    upstream_registry_url      = string
    credential_arn             = optional(string)
    custom_role_arn            = optional(string)
    upstream_repository_prefix = optional(string)
    region                     = optional(string)
  }))

root.description: The tag mutability setting for the repository. Must be one of: `MUTABLE`, `MUTABLE_WITH_EXCLUSION`, `IMMUTABLE`, or `IMMUTABLE_WITH_EXCLUSION`. Defaults to `IMMUTABLE`
root.name: repository_image_tag_mutability

root.description: The encryption type for the repository. Must be one of: `KMS` or `AES256`. Defaults to `AES256`
root.name: repository_encryption_type

root.description: Configuration block that defines filters to specify which image tags can override the default tag mutability setting. Only applicable when image_tag_mutability is set to IMMUTABLE_WITH_EXCLUSION or MUTABLE_WITH_EXCLUSION.
root.name: repository_image_tag_mutability_exclusion_filter

root.description: Determines whether a repository policy will be created
root.name: create_repository_policy

root.description: A map of IAM policy [statements](https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/aws/latest/docs/data-sources/iam_policy_document#statement) for custom permission usage
root.name: repository_policy_statements

root.description: The name of the repository
root.name: repository_name

root.description: Determines whether a lifecycle policy will be created
root.name: create_lifecycle_policy

root.description: The policy document. This is a JSON formatted string
root.name: registry_policy

root.description: One or multiple blocks specifying scanning rules to determine which repository filters are used and at what frequency scanning will occur
root.name: registry_scan_rules

root.description: Determines whether resources will be created (affects all resources)
root.name: create

root.description: The ARNs of the IAM users/roles that have read access to the repository
root.name: repository_read_access_arns

root.description: The ARNs of the Lambda service roles that have read access to the repository
root.name: repository_lambda_read_access_arns

repository-template.description: IAM role name
repository-template.name: iam_role_name

repository-template.description: IAM role ARN
repository-template.name: iam_role_arn

repository-template.description: Stable and unique string identifying the IAM role
repository-template.name: iam_role_unique_id

root.description: The registry ID where the repository was created
root.name: repository_registry_id

root.description: The URL of the repository
root.name: repository_url

root.description: Name of the repository
root.name: repository_name

root.description: Full ARN of the repository
root.name: repository_arn
